origin.name: South Africa
origin.investigating_authority: South African Police Service (SAPS) and state pathologist
origin.post_mortem_trigger: Unexpected, violent, suspicious, or unnatural deaths
origin.death_certificate_name: BI-1663 (Department of Home Affairs death certificate)
origin.key_document: South African death certificate (BI-1663, Home Affairs registered)
origin.source: FCDO South Africa travel advice, updated 2025; British High Commission Pretoria guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom
special_rules: Documentation is in English throughout. No translation required.
SAPS and state pathologist involved for unexpected or unnatural deaths.
Well-developed funeral sector with direct long-haul flight connections to Heathrow.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. South African documentation is in English and typically accepted directly. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British High Commission in Pretoria and consulates in Cape Town and Durban can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: South Africa to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in South Africa. Repatriation to the UK takes 10-21 days. BI-1663 certificate and direct flights handled. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland
special_rules: Irish Embassy in Pretoria handles consular matters.
Documentation in English throughout. No translation required.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. Documentation is in English and typically accepted directly. The Coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. The Irish Embassy in Pretoria can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: South Africa to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in South Africa and needs to come home to Ireland. Repatriation takes 10-21 days. BI-1663 and all documentation handled. Contact us.
